# The Party Wreckers Podcast - AI Context File

> Real conversations about addiction, intervention, and recovery. Hosted by Matt Brown, professional interventionist.

## About The Party Wreckers

The Party Wreckers is a podcast hosted by Matt Brown (and co-hosted by Sam Davis), both full-time addiction interventionists. The show delivers honest, practical conversations about addiction, intervention, family dynamics, and recovery — helping families find hope and actionable guidance.

The name "Party Wreckers" reflects what interventionists do: they show up uninvited to the party that addiction is throwing and shut it down.

## Host

**Matt Brown** — Professional interventionist with over 20 years of experience and 22 years of personal recovery. Founder of Freedom Interventions. Has conducted over 1,000 professional interventions across the United States and Canada.

## What the Podcast Covers

- How addiction affects families (not just the person using)
- What professional interventions actually look like (vs. TV dramatizations)
- Boundary setting for families of addicted loved ones
- Enabling behaviors and how to recognize them
- Treatment options and how to navigate the treatment industry
- Recovery stories and lessons learned
- Mental health topics related to addiction
- Current drug trends and substance-specific education

## Key Resources on the Website

### Episodes
Full catalog of podcast episodes.
URL: https://partywreckers.com/episodes

### Blog
Written content complementing podcast topics.
URL: https://partywreckers.com/blog

### Family Resources
Curated tools and guides for families dealing with addiction.
URL: https://partywreckers.com/family-resources

### Family Reflection Tool
Guided self-reflection exercise for family members.
URL: https://partywreckers.com/family-reflection

### Fear Inventory
Structured exercise to identify and process fears related to a loved one's addiction.
URL: https://partywreckers.com/fear-inventory

### Conversation Starters
Frameworks and prompts for difficult conversations about addiction with loved ones.
URL: https://partywreckers.com/conversation-starters

- Buzzsprout: https://www.buzzsprout.com/1941777
- Available on all major podcast platforms

## Related Properties

- **Freedom Interventions** — Professional intervention services: https://freedominterventions.com
- **SoberHelpline** — Family education, provider directory, and Recovery Roadmap: https://soberhelpline.com
- **No More Enabling** — Education on enabling behaviors and boundaries: https://nomoreenabling.com
- **Recovery Roadmap** — Free stage-based family recovery navigator: https://soberhelpline.com/roadmap
